payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Dark stained wooden nightstand with three stacked drawers and metal pull handles, rectangular glossy top with small objects visible, carved base molding and curved side detail; mostly full-frontal view with slight shadowing — estimated distance from camera ~1.0 m.
